message:
fix: apply Clippy use_self lint, fix telemetry ZoneId, update invoke response shape

- figma/error.rs: replace FigmaError:: with Self:: in ConnectorErrorMapping
- linear/error.rs: alphabetize use statements
- fcp-telemetry/usage.rs: fix ZoneId::work() to ZoneId::private() in test
- fcp-host integration test: access .result directly on flattened response

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -3185,9 +3185,8 @@ async fn fcp_host_binary_cancel_route_allows_follow_up_invoke_after_cleanup()
     assert_eq!(follow_up_response.status, InvokeStatus::Ok);
     assert_eq!(
         follow_up_response
-            .output
+            .result
             .as_ref()
-            .and_then(|output| output.get("result"))
             .and_then(|result| result.get("echo"))
             .and_then(|echo| echo.get("message"))
             .and_then(Value::as_str),

@@ -1502,7 +1502,7 @@ mod tests {
             10,
         );
         let e_private = event_for(
-            ZoneId::work(),
+            ZoneId::private(),
             ConnectorId::from_static("fcp.x:request-response:1"),
             CapabilityId::from_static("fcp.x.read"),
             SafetyTier::Safe,

+                "fcp.zzz.write",

             (ZoneId::work(), "fcp.aaa:request-response:1", "fcp.aaa.read"),
